programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid and Jean become worried about their lovesick son, and invite the object of his affections to tea

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: Roger joins forces with Mim to tackle a double challenge - the threat of a game being called off due to rain, and a challenge to his leadership from another member of the team. Cricketing comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn, Robert Daws, Timothy Spall and Josie Lawrence

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The sleuthing spinster is invited to the wedding of her former housemaid Gwenda, only to be caught up in a murder mystery involving the groom's family. Geraldine McEwan stars, with Juliet Stevenson, Denis Lawson and Alison Steadman

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Phil and Geoff keep watch on the illegal gambling club owned by Kenny Dekin (guest Ron Donachie), in the hope of finding evidence to close the establishment. Rob is concerned about his future with Carol as he anxiously awaits the results of his sergeant exams, while David is pleased with the outcome when he strikes out on his own

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Mandy orders the Dingles to tidy up ahead of Paddy's mum's arrival. Viv insists to Vic that she did not hit Kelly. Ned is furious about Helen Ackroyd's article regarding Jan

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Sarah advises Tony not to give up on his marriage. Paddy apologises to the Dingles, but makes things worse with Mandy. Becky gives Tony an ultimatum

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Kevin tells Natalie he needs time to think. Maureen tells Maud about her one-night stand with Curly, and Bill warns him to keep away from Maureen

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Natalie asks Kevin to stay with her for the weekend and not see Sally. Maureen is furious with Bill for punching Curly. Judy is alarmed to see Liam bruised and bandaged

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A professor is found dead on Halloween with a stake through her heart and Hobson reveals she shared a house with the victim in her university days. A medium visits Lewis claiming to have foreseen the tragedy, and ghostly messages spelled out in fridge magnet letters start appearing in a house occupied by four students. As the detective struggles with the possibility his friend is somehow implicated in the crime, a tale of jealousy and revenge begins to unfold. Rupert Graves (Sherlock) and Niamh Cusack (Heartbeat) guest star

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: A gathering at the Devon estate of Miss Marple's old school friend Lady Tressilian leads to murder when the eccentric Mr Treves tells the story of an unconvicted child killer. Miss Marple is on hand to assist Supt Mallard of the local constabulary, but not before a second victim is claimed. Mystery, starring Geraldine McEwan, with guest appearances by Eileen Atkins, Tom Baker, Paul Nicholls, Alan Davies and Greg Wise, with a cameo by former British number-one tennis player Greg Rusedski

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The dapper detective accepts an invitation to spend yuletide at the house of an elderly millionaire who seems intent on provoking his money-grubbing sons into murdering him. At first he tries hard to ignore the strained atmosphere and relax - but soon finds himself with a gruesome mystery on his hands. Agatha Christie whodunit, starring David Suchet and Philip Jackson

programme.title: Beecham House
programme.desc: A murder throws John's plans of staying in Delhi into jeopardy, while a member of the household reveals a treacherous side to their nature that proves dangerous. However, John soon finds that he has people around him he can trust when Margaret places herself at great personal risk to help him. Period drama, starring Tom Bateman

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: David Jason returns as DI Jack Frost in this feature-length episode. Faced with the death of a police informant on an estate riven with racial tension, the detective finds his patience pushed to the limit. Bruce Alexander and Lennie James also star

programme.title: Cheat
programme.desc: Leah deals with the fallout of Adam's betrayal, but some unexpected news further complicates matters. A distraction comes in the form of Michael and Angela's anniversary party, but as Rose's behaviour becomes progressively more volatile, the truth is finally exposed over the course of one explosive evening, with devastating consequences. Starring Katherine Kelly and Molly Windsor

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: A gathering at the Devon estate of Miss Marple's old school friend Lady Tressilian leads to murder when the eccentric Mr Treves tells the story of an unconvicted child killer. Miss Marple is on hand to assist Supt Mallard of the local constabulary, but not before a second victim is claimed. Mystery, starring Geraldine McEwan, with guest appearances by Eileen Atkins, Tom Baker, Paul Nicholls, Alan Davies and Greg Wise, with a cameo by former British number-one tennis player Greg Rusedski

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Intrigue spreads among the residents of Aidensfield as Frances Elliot causes havoc with her car. An outraged Peggy decides to investigate the rumours about the newcomer and discovers she appears to be hiding something. Rob receives some good news in the post but is later forced into making a life-changing decision. Kerrie Taylor guests

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jack advises Tony not to believe that Becky will go through with the divorce. Paddy's mum pushes him to get in touch with his ex. Jez and Sam have an altercation in the Woolpack

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: The Dingles arrive at the magistrates court for Sam's hearing. Jan is shocked to read the article about her in the Hotten Courier. Kim asks Seth to give her away at her wedding

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Emily chases Alec for the raffle money to give to the hospital. Gary tells Judy he thinks Liam is trying to blackmail him. Samantha agrees to model for Angie

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Alec is furious when Emily doubts his honesty. Gary is amazed when Judy confesses to giving Liam money. Natalie tells Kevin she cannot cope without him

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Oxford's last-surviving all-female college is holding a reunion to bid farewell to one of its most prominent professors. However, the evening leads to tragedy when a guest is found murdered, and Lewis is convinced the killing is connected to an attack that occurred at the same institution 10 years previously. The detective calls in his former DS, Alison McLennan, to help with the investigation, but the case takes a twist when two more bodies turn up. Crime drama, guest starring Juliet Stevenson and Saskia Reeves, with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Geraldine McEwan makes her last appearance as the spinster sleuth before handing over the knitting needles to Julia McKenzie. Following the death of old acquaintance Mr Rafiel, Miss Marple receives instructions drawn up prior to his demise asking her to embark on a coach tour to investigate an unspecified possible crime. It soon transpires that many of her companions are also travelling at his invitation and they are all in some way connected to a girl who went missing from a nun's sanctuary during World War Two, supposedly to be with her German lover, Rafiel's son Michael. Murder mystery, with a star-studded supporting cast including Richard E Grant, Johnny Briggs, Amanda Burton, Anne Reid, Ronni Ancona, George Cole, Will Mellor and Laura Michelle Kelly

programme.title: Victoria
programme.desc: Feature-length festive special. It is Christmas 1846 and Victoria is uncharacteristically sad as she prepares to face her first Christmas without her beloved Baroness Lehzen, while Albert transforms the palace into a magical festive wonderland as he is gripped by an obsession with staging the perfect family Christmas. But tensions between the couple mount when the prince invites house guests to join the celebrations. Meanwhile, Skerrett inherits a large estate from an estranged uncle. Starring Jenna Coleman and Tom Hughes

programme.title: Beecham House
programme.desc: Violet witnesses Chandrika going into John's room at night, and tells his mother what she saw. Margaret is devastated when she finds out and resolves to leave Delhi. John realises his only hope of persuading her to stay is to reveal the truth about his past and the baby's identity - even if it puts the child's safety in jeopardy

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: The apparent accidental death of a drug addict takes a surprising turn when the results of the post-mortem examination are revealed, and Jack finds himself confronting his own chequered past. Ewen Bremner guest-stars, with David Jason

programme.title: Cheat
programme.desc: As the police try to piece together the fatal sequence of events, both women come under the spotlight, but have they got the right one? As the investigation spirals, Leah realises she must come face to face with Rose one last time, but it may be too late. Final episode of the drama, starring Katherine Kelly and Molly Windsor

programme.desc: Maureen is disappointed with her night out with Bill. Fiona is pleased that Alan is going to move in with her. The raffle at the Rovers results in tragedy

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jack is uncomfortable being described as a miracle worker. Natalie invites Kevin to spend the night with her. Conway tells Jack how Alec ripped him off

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Becky tells Zoe that Tony knows about them. Eric thinks Dee is planning to leave him. Kathy and Rachel are asked out on a date by two firemen

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Becky acts coldly towards Zoe. Eric accuses Dee of kissing Will. The police locate Dee with news from the Philippines that her mother has died

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Geoff and Phil find two men acting suspiciously, but two others escape from the scene and the officers soon find themselves in danger and under siege. At the Aidensfield Arms the residents gather to watch the moon landing, although one guest gives Gina cause for concern

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid gets in a flap when he learns his employer is planning to visit him at home. Family comedy, starring Sid James and Diana Coupland

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: A misunderstanding between Sid and Betty leads to chaos and confusion. Family comedy, starring Sid James and Diana Coupland

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: Tongues are set wagging when a few unlikely liaisons are formed at the Brent Park barbecue. Cricketing comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn, Robert Daws, Timothy Spall and Josie Lawrence

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa is not best pleased when her new art teacher Erica wants to try out some rather alternative ideas on the children, while Dr Timoney is involved in a car accident outside the school. Penhale is confused when he is offered a transfer to Exeter, Bert decides to go back to being a handyman, and Louisa and Martin are intrigued when Dr Timoney invites them for an additional therapy session. Plus, an American tourist seeks help from the GP. Comedy drama, with a cameo appearance by Sigourney Weaver

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa worries Dr Timoney's suggestion that she and Martin aren't meant to be together might have prompted him to leave Portwenn for good. Calling on Ruth, Morwenna and Janice for help, she tries to track the down the missing GP, with no luck. However, what Dr Ellingham's friends and family fail to realise is that he is actually trapped up at the Winton farm, where desperate wife Annie is trying to coerce him into performing a life-saving operation on her terminally ill husband Jim. Meanwhile, Ruth and Bert seek out Al to offer him a proposition regarding the whisky and the B&B. Medical drama, starring Martin Clunes

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Peggy hatches a plan to save Bernie when he becomes the target of a predatory widow (guest star Mel Martin). Carol struggles to control her feelings of guilt when a newborn baby dies in her care, and grows more distressed when Rob arrests the bereaved father after a violent altercation at the Aidensfield Arms. Thomas Craig also guests

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Dee refuses to speak to Eric and books a flight home for her mother's funeral, so he dashes to the airport to stop her from leaving. Will and Marlon fight in the Woolpack

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Eric decides to close the wine bar. Paddy panics when his mum announces that she is coming to visit. Emma hears about what happened between Becky and Zoe

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Curly is concerned to find Maureen crying in the shop. Rita warns Natalie to keep away from Kevin. Samantha lords it over Judy at the Rovers

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Curly spends an uncomfortable night in the shop's backroom. Samantha worries that she gives men the wrong impression. Deirdre takes over at Sunliners

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Hathaway and Lewis investigate a murder committed on the first night of a quiz weekend held at Chaucer College. Sealing the college grounds to interrogate the remaining 11 contestants, the pair discover the victim had a track record for sexual harassment involving fellow competitors, as well as past dealings with a shady engineering business funded by Russian gangsters and masterminded by Oxford professor Charles Milner - another quiz fan. With guest stars Alan Davies (QI), Timothy West (Bleak House) and Nicholas Farrell (The Iron Lady)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The sleuthing spinster is invited to the wedding of her former housemaid Gwenda, only to be caught up in a murder mystery involving the groom's family. Geraldine McEwan stars, with Juliet Stevenson, Denis Lawson and Alison Steadman

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: It's a time of joy and happiness in Midsomer for once - Christmas is coming, and DCI Barnaby and his wife Sarah are soon to become parents. But the festive mood changes when a man is stabbed to death with an antique sword during a ghost-hunting party at a spooky manor house in Morton Shallows. Local historian Brendan Pearce thinks blacksmith's daughter Rose Wilton is seeking revenge from beyond the grave, but Barnaby and sidekick Charlie Nelson try to find a more earthly motive behind the murder. Starring Neil Dudgeon and Gwilym Lee, with Fiona Dolman, Les Dennis, Elizabeth Berrington, Mark Heap, Emily Joyce, James Murray and Hannah Tointon

programme.title: Beecham House
programme.desc: With the arrival of his mother Henrietta from London and the discovery of his younger brother Daniel in a military camp close by, John has finally fulfilled his dream of having his family reunited. But, the arrival of the mysterious Chandrika throws the household into chaos and threatens to break the family apart

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Jack finds himself working alongside DS Lawson on a delicate case involving a spate of attacks on defenceless senior citizens in their homes, while Lawson also offers him some advice on his personal life. David Jason stars, with Bruce Alexander, Sally Dexter and Neil Phillips

programme.title: Cheat
programme.desc: With relations becoming increasingly hostile, Leah resorts to more extreme measures to expose Rose, and as tensions flare between Leah and Adam, could it be that her husband is taking Rose's side? Later, Rose seems to pursue a more personal retaliation against Leah, but who is telling the truth? Katherine Kelly, Molly Windsor and Tom Goodman-Hill star

programme.title: Sport Filler Shows (2020)
programme.desc: A selection of the best World Cup Goals through the years - beginning with Geoff Hurst's hat-trick for England in 1966, right up to the 2018 World Cup in Russia

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie's former girlfriend visits from East Germany and he finds himself framed for carrying out an assassination attempt - leaving Doyle with no choice but to bring him in for questioning. Drama, starring Lewis Collins and Martin Shaw

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: The Saint is framed for the murder of a young sculptor, and with the help of the victim's girlfriend, Chief Inspector Teal fights to clear his name and uncover the real culprit. Adventure, starring Roger Moore

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: The duo learn the origin of an old feud, and investigate a protection racket run by a vicious gang boss. Drama, starring Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur is held by the police after a car he is importing from Europe is impounded by drugs officers, so Terry goes in search of those he suspects are responsible for his boss' predicament - the vehicle's original owners. Light-hearted crime drama, starring George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: CI5 is assigned to protect an Middle Eastern diplomat who is being pursued by assassins. Bodie and Doyle find themselves relentlessly pursued by a gang of assailants that seems able to accurately anticipate their every move, leading to a tense car chase and a riverside shoot-out. Both chefs go to outlandish extremes to perfect their replicas, from spending massive sums on speciality ovens to conducting spy-missions at their local pizza parlours. stores. programme.title: The World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: A trip through Devon to the tip of Cornwall, going back in time to recapture the golden age of luxury train travel. Travelling in the elegantly restored Statesman, passengers relax in its vintage carriages and enjoy the exquisite service. The first stop is on the stunning Devon coast, which suffered devastating destruction during the heavy winter storms of 2014. From Dawlish, it heads to Cornwall and across the Royal Albert Bridge, a masterpiece of railway engineering

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian Norton and Peter Wright attend the Great Yorkshire Show in Harrogate, where cattle farmer Graham Hunt and sheep farmer Mark Elliot are competing in its 160th anniversary year. Cameras also explore the picturesque village of Dunsforth as it puts on its annual Country Fair and Dog Show, where Julian will open the fete and judge the dog show

programme.title: Christmas at Hampton Court
programme.desc: Behind the scenes at royal Christmas celebrations past and present. Chief Curator Tracy Borman explores traditions that date back to the reign of Henry VIII, from blessing the giant shire horses to bringing in the mistletoe from the Home Park. The programme reveals how traditional greenery is still brought in to decorate the palace, just as it would have been in Tudor times, and reveals the carol service that takes place in the Chapel Royal

programme.title: Princess Alice: The Royals' Greatest Secret
programme.desc: The remarkable story of the Queen's mother-in-law and Prince Philip's mother, Princess Alice of Battenberg, featuring archive footage and interviews with those who know her story best. Her remarkable life saw her born deaf and diagnosed with schizophrenia, sent to a mental asylum, given controversial electroshock treatment and treated by Sigmund Freud. She also found an order of nursing nuns in Greece, before finally coming to live at Buckingham Palace, with the Queen

programme.title: A Royal Night Out (2015)
programme.desc: It is VE Day in 1945 and as peace extends across Europe, Princesses Elizabeth and Margaret are allowed out to join the celebrations in London, despite their mother's protestations. Comedy drama, starring Bel Powley, Sarah Gadon, Emily Watson and Rupert Everett

programme.desc: British shoppers buy 95 per cent of their food from just 10 supermarket chains. But how much do they really know about how this produce is grown, made and sold? programme.desc: Seasonal special of the documentary following expats on the Costa del Sol. Novice shopkeepers Russell and Lindsay have a crisis on their hands when the meat-and-veg packs they have ordered are delivered in the wrong sizes. Ex-nurse Susie and husband Reg spend Christmas Day volunteering at a dog shelter in Estepona, and Doncaster lass Margaret belts out a few tunes with the choir - but they are a bit out of tune. Scottish couple Ivor and Barbara prepare for their first Christmas in Spain since arriving six months ago

programme.title: Inside Lidl at Christmas
programme.desc: With Britain facing its toughest December in memory, this programme goes behind the doors of the budget supermarket to find out how it is preparing for Christmas - and how it keeps its prices down. The Wynne family put Lidl through its paces by trying out its turkey and trimmings, there's a Christmas pudding taste test and a look at the store's decorations and random gifts

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes at Hull Royal Infirmary to show the night-time challenges facing NHS staff working in the A&E department. A 34-year-old man is brought in after having punched his arm through a pub window. Handcuffed and accompanied by four police officers, his behaviour has medical staff fearing for the wellbeing of other patients. Matron Kat Henry deals with a flirtatious patient who has cut his head after a night out on the town and is determined to leave the hospital without treatment

programme.title: Extraordinary People
programme.desc: The story of Noah, a young boy who was born with less than two per cent of a normal brain. The update reveals the extraordinary progress he has made since his treatment, with his brain continuing to develop beyond all expectation, which has confounded medical professionals

programme.title: Martin Lewis: The Price of Fame
programme.desc: Martin talks to Debbie McGee, the former magician's assistant who became a fully fledged star in her own right, but also faced accusations of being a gold-digger. She gives her thoughts on that, reveals how much she was paid for jobs throughout her career and how she and husband Paul Daniels capitalised on their fame

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: Chappie (2015)
programme.desc: Two small-time crooks kidnap the inventor of a highly intelligent law-enforcement robot. They force him to reprogram the android so it will help them carry out an audacious heist worth $200million, but in doing so, incur the wrath of a ruthless and corrupt general. Sci-fi thriller, starring Sharlto Copley, Hugh Jackman and Dev Patel

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Torres is forced to rely on old case notes and contacts after a US Marine's murder is linked to a former dirt bike gang he once joined for a year-long undercover sting operation. Wilmer Valderrama stars

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Ann Maurice and Tris Payne visit Southampton's prestigious marina development Ocean Village, where a couple's home needs sprucing up to attract potential buyers after being on the market for three months

programme.title: Waterloo Road (1944)
programme.desc: A soldier serving in the Second World War discovers his wife has betrayed him by having an affair with a petty crook, so he resolves to settle matters and deserts from the army. He returns to a Blitz-ravaged London to confront his rival, but his quest for retribution is interrupted by an air raid. Drama, starring John Mills, Joy Shelton, Alastair Sim and Stewart Granger

programme.title: The Miracle of Morgan's Creek (1943)
programme.desc: A woman spends a night out drinking with six soldiers who are heading off to war and wakes up the next morning to find she is married to one of them - but has no idea which. Comedy, starring Betty Hutton, Eddie Bracken and William Demarest

programme.title: Run for Cover (1955)
programme.desc: An honest gunfighter is released from prison after serving time for a crime he did not commit and soon befriends a young upstart. When the older man is appointed sheriff of a nearby town, he insists that his protege is made deputy - but soon discovers his loyalty is misplaced. Western, directed by Nicholas Ray and starring James Cagney, John Derek, Viveca Lindfors and Jean Hersholt

programme.title: Rage at Dawn (1955)
programme.desc: Three notorious outlaw brothers terrorise Indiana, using a small town as a safe haven and paying off local officials to turn a blind eye. A detective poses as a fellow bandit to set a trap for them, but the case is complicated when he falls for their sister, who remains misguidedly loyal to her villainous family. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Forrest Tucker, Mala Powers and J Carrol Naish

programme.title: Star Trek Into Darkness (2013)
programme.desc: Captain Kirk and the crew of the starship Enterprise are sent on a clandestine mission into enemy territory to track down the rogue Starfleet agent behind a terrorist attack on Earth. However, the assignment brings to light a hidden threat from within their own organisation. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Chris Pine, Zachary Quinto and Benedict Cumberbatch

programme.title: Die Hard 4.0 (2007)
programme.desc: Tough New York cop John McClane is sent to escort a computer hacker to Washington for questioning. During this routine operation he stumbles on a criminal mastermind's plan to launch a technological terrorist attack on the US, and is forced to enlist the hacker's aid in foiling the evil scheme. Action thriller sequel, with Bruce Willis, Timothy Olyphant, Justin Long and Maggie Q

programme.title: Mike and Dave Need Wedding Dates (2016)
programme.desc: Two hard-partying brothers place an online advertisement to find the perfect dates for their sister's Hawaiian wedding. Hoping for a wild getaway, the boys instead find themselves out-hustled by an uncontrollable duo and calamity ensues. Comedy, starring Zac Efron, Anna Kendrick and Adam Devine

programme.title: Cuban Fury (2014)
programme.desc: A boy's dream of being a champion salsa dancer is shattered by bullies. Twenty years later, he returns to the dance floor as an overweight and under-confident adult, and tries to get his old footwork back in a bid to sweep his boss off her feet. Comedy, starring Nick Frost, Chris O'Dowd, Rashida Jones, Ian McShane and Olivia Colman

programme.title: Our Man in Havana (1959)
programme.desc: A vacuum cleaner salesman is recruited as an agent by British intelligence, but struggles to cope with the demands of the role and starts to fabricate information to keep himself gainfully employed. Carol Reed's satirical spy drama, based on Graham Greene's novel, starring Alec Guinness, Ralph Richardson, Maureen O'Hara, Noel Coward and Burl Ives

programme.title: Thunder Over Arizona (1956)
programme.desc: An honest cowboy is mistaken for the notorious outlaw he killed in self-defence. Before he can clear up the misunderstanding, he is approached by a corrupt mayor who draws him into a conspiracy to wrest control of a silver mine from its rightful owners. Western, starring Skip Homeier, Kristine Miller, George Macready and Wallace Ford

programme.title: The Odessa File (1974)
programme.desc: The detailed diaries of a former inmate of a concentration camp fall into the hands of an investigative journalist. Incensed by what he reads, he embarks on a crusade to discover the prison commandant's new identity and expose his crimes to the world. In the process, the trail leads him to a secret organisation that helped Nazi SS officers escape justice. Thriller, based on Frederick Forsyth's novel, starring Jon Voight, Derek Jacobi and siblings Maria and Maximilian Schell

programme.title: Three Faces West (1940)
programme.desc: An Austrian doctor and his daughter arrive in the dust bowl regions of America after fleeing the Nazis, and join the exodus of farmers seeking fertile land in Oregon. The daughter falls for the pioneer leading the journey, despite being engaged to the man who helped her escape the Third Reich. Drama, starring John Wayne, Charles Coburn and Sigrid Gurie

programme.title: Gifted (2017)
programme.desc: Single man Frank Adler attempts to raise his child prodigy niece, Mary. However, his plans for a normal school life for the youngster are foiled when the youngster's mathematical abilities come to the attention of Frank's formidable mother, Evelyn. Drama, starring Chris Evans, Lindsay Duncan and Mckenna Grace

programme.title: The Great Wall (2016)
programme.desc: In the 11th century, a group of Europeans set out for China to discover how to make gunpowder. However, on arrival their claims to be on a trading mission are disbelieved and they are arrested and imprisoned by the Nameless Order within the Great Wall - just as it is about to be beset by giant, lizard-like monsters. As wave after wave of attacks and surprise tactics batter the Wall, Europeans and Chinese battle hoards of the alien creatures in a series of escalating conflicts leading to a final confrontation with the alien queen. Fantasy adventure, starring Matt Damon, Willem Dafoe and Tian Jing

programme.title: Prisoners (2013)
programme.desc: Two young girls go missing in Pennsylvania over the Thanksgiving holidays, and suspicion initially falls on Alex Jones, a young man with apparent learning difficulties, who was spotted near the children's last known location. When no evidence of wrongdoing is found, Jones is freed from custody, but the distraught father of one of the missing youngsters is not convinced of Jones' innocence, and kidnaps him in the hope of extracting a confession by force. Thriller, starring Hugh Jackman, Jake Gyllenhaal and Paul Dano

programme.title: Bait (2019)
programme.desc: Tension rises to breaking point in a Cornish fishing village when the local citizens are crowded out by tourists. Writer-director Mark Jenkin's Bafta-winning drama, starring Edward Rowe, Simon Shepherd and Mary Woodvine

programme.title: Pursued (1947)
programme.desc: A brooding cowboy yearns to find peace, but his life seems to follow a tragic path because of the actions and hatred of a mysterious one-armed stranger and a forgotten incident from his childhood. Western, starring Robert Mitchum, Teresa Wright, Dean Jagger, Judith Anderson, Alan Hale and John Rodney

programme.title: Carry On Spying (1964)
programme.desc: A secret formula is stolen by a sinister organisation masterminded by the evil Dr Crow. The British government plans to assign its top agents to deal with the crisis, but owing to staff shortages, has to settle for a bungling spy and his three hapless trainees. Comedy, starring Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey, Barbara Windsor, Bernard Cribbins, Jim Dale, Eric Barker and Victor Maddern

programme.title: The Savage (1952)
programme.desc: A white man raised by the Sioux after his family were killed by Crow warriors finds his loyalties tested in later life. Western, starring Charlton Heston, Susan Morrow and Peter Hansen

programme.title: Elephant Walk (1954)
programme.desc: A woman struggles to come to terms with her tea plantation owner husband's obsession with his dead father. Melodrama, starring Elizabeth Taylor, Peter Finch, Dana Andrews and Abraham Sofaer

programme.title: GI Joe: The Rise of Cobra (2009)
programme.desc: When a powerful experimental weapon is snatched by a mysterious terrorist organisation, two of the soldiers guarding it are recruited into a top-secret military strike force. As they go in search of the stolen technology, they uncover a plot by its creator to take over the world. Action adventure, with Channing Tatum, Sienna Miller and Christopher Eccleston

programme.title: Finding Your Feet (2017)
programme.desc: A wealthy woman's privileged existence is shattered when she discovers her husband is having an affair with her best friend. Seeking solace, she turns to her estranged sister, who lives in a London council estate, and finds a new lease of life in joining her community dance class. Comedy, starring Imelda Staunton, Celia Imrie, Timothy Spall and Joanna Lumley

programme.title: Maze Runner: The Scorch Trials (2015)
programme.desc: The children who escaped from an isolated community at the centre of a mysterious labyrinth find themselves in a desolate wasteland. As they seek the truth about the organisation that imprisoned them, they face a series of terrible dangers. Sci-fi adventure based on the second of James Dashner's series of novels, starring Dylan O'Brien and Kaya Scodelario

programme.title: X-Men Origins: Wolverine (2009)
programme.desc: Years before he joins the superhero team, mutant Logan is a member of a top secret military unit, but quits because he cannot justify his squad's brutal methods. However, when the woman he loves is murdered by his psychotic brother, Logan returns to his old enemies for help in seeking revenge - and is offered the chance to become indestructible. Superhero adventure prequel, starring Hugh Jackman and Liev Schreiber

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Tony is betrayed once again by those closest to him and vows to start standing up for himself. Elsewhere, Warren confronts Liberty and Brody

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Mercedes works with the police to track down Silas, but endangers Cher's life in the process. Meanwhile, the McQueens are blackmailed again, this time with the sin of gluttony

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: The young witch uses an aging lotion to appear more sophisticated, which she thinks will impress Josh. Meanwhile, Salem falls in love

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: In the aftermath of her kiss with Josh, Sabrina is trying to adjust to life without Harvey - but both of them are miserable without the other

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Robin tells Barney she wants to begin their married life in a new home as she feels uncomfortable living in a flat where so many women have been before her. However, Barney is reluctant to sell his bachelor pad and starts to drive away prospective buyers. Meanwhile, Lily's demanding new job working for The Captain (Kyle MacLachlan) as an art consultant begins to take its toll on her relationship with Marshall

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted is unsure what to do when Barney asks him to go to a Robots versus Wrestlers show, and to help him decide he is visited by two future versions of himself, along with a brace of Barneys. Meanwhile, Marshall challenges Robin to a dance-off when they fall out over who should take the credit for a new cocktail invented at McLaren's bar

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel contemplates the future of her relationship as George is offered an amazing new job abroad, while Ryder's relationship is also becoming more serious as he meets Holly's parents. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel's father returns to the town to lobby for a bill that his daughter is strongly opposed to. Elsewhere, some of Lennox's poems catch the attention of a popular classmate who wants to become a singer. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys compete for a tenured professor position at the university, leading them to try to win over the committee in charge of appointing a new staff member, and arguing about who deserves the spot the most. However, the panel includes Mrs Davis from Human Resources, whom Sheldon has crossed paths with before. Guest starring Regina King

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy tries to help Sheldon get over his desire for closure when one of his favourite TV shows is cancelled on a cliffhanger ending. Raj discovers his new girlfriend Lucy has a blog in which she has written about him, and is upset when he learns she believes he has feminine qualities, causing him to worry about their relationship

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: After dropping Andre Jr off at college, Dre and Rainbow are beside themselves when he turns up at home announcing his decision to take a gap year. Meanwhile, Jack and Diane begin to question whether they should still be sharing a room. Return of the comedy, starring Anthony Anderson and Tracee Ellis Ross

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Dre enjoys calling the police over petty neighbourhood issues but begins to question the example he is setting for Jack. Rainbow wants to help when Diane develops her first crush

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta is in danger of losing his flat but has no money to buy his own place, so Gina does her best to find him a new home. Holt and Jeffords organise self-evaluations for all the staff at the precinct, while Boyle helps Diaz to take revenge on one of the weekend squad officers who always makes a mess of her desk

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta tries to set a new record on a training course, Diaz does not receive an invitation to Boyle's wedding, and Holt becomes addicted to a game application on his smartphone. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As Sheldon stresses out about picking a wedding date, Amy tries to convince him that he has a more laid-back side. Meanwhile, Raj and Stuart compete to win the heart of Bernadette's new colleague Ruchi. Swati Kapila guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is devastated when his mother befriends Penny. Howard and Sheldon bond when they drive into the desert to shoot off a model rocket. Christine Baranski guest stars

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: The medics' residencies come to an end and they prepare to go their separate ways. JD finally gets his own place, while Turk and Carla ponder the possibility of parenthood. Elliot is offered a position at another hospital, and Dr Cox argues with Dr Kelso

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: JD has to take charge of his own interns now he is an attending physician. Carla wants a baby, but Turk resolves to stop her getting her way. Elliot feels unhappy at County Hospital, and comes up with a series of excuses to return to Sacred Heart

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel and Joe are shocked to discover that Lennox's boyfriend Aidan spent the night in her bedroom, but Joe is even more taken aback at Mel's easy-going reaction to the situation. Meanwhile, Ryder's girlfriend Holly declares that it is time for him to start shaving

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: When Joe starts to run Mel's finances, he becomes convinced that her credit card statement reveals that she is having an affair with a married man. Meanwhile, Lennox tries to get along with her friend's new date - until he reveals that he has a crush on her and Ryder tries to decide what to get Holly for her birthday

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta hits it off with Sophia, a woman he meets in a bar, only to find out she is the defence attorney representing a perpetrator he is trying to put behind bars. Diaz pressures Santiago to stand as a union rep, while Gina and Boyle try to move on from their relationship. Eva Longoria (best known as Desperate Housewives' Gaby) joins the cast

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The precinct goes into lockdown on Thanksgiving when a mysterious powder-filled package is delivered to the building. Peralta, who has been left in charge while Holt and Jeffords are out of the office, is confident he can keep morale high and avoid any chaos - but things soon spiral out of control

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: The Charmed Ones must infiltrate a faction gala event in order to rescue Harry, and Macy comes to a stunning conclusion

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj finds himself in the middle of a domestic drama when he realises that the woman he's dating, Nell, has a husband, Oliver, who is very upset about their new relationship. Sheldon rents his old room back to have a quiet place to work and drives Leonard crazy by being a model tenant

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon petitions Wil Wheaton to allow him to appear on the new Professor Proton show, so the actor offers a guest appearance to Amy instead. Meanwhile, Penny gets angry when she thinks the female protagonist in Leonard's novel is based on her

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Sylver pushes Mercedes away when he finds out what she has been doing, and Brooke confides in Nancy about her feelings for Imran

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Russell Howard uses ear wax to charm a nice lady called Carol, Asim Chaudhry goes digging for invertebrates and Liza Tarbuck makes a puzzle for children

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: To track down an infamous arms dealer, Peralta and Jeffords go undercover at an illegal gambling club, but when Captain Holt tries to coach them in the art of poker, his addiction resurfaces. Boyle buys a food truck that was formerly the site of a brutal double murder, to the horror of his only investor in the project, Santiago. Hitchcock and Scully have an unusual challenge for Dia. Cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding, Sandi Toksvig, Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood are reunited in the tent. Joining them are Kate Henry from the 2014 series, Dr Tamal Ray from 2015, 2016 winner Candice Brown, and finalist Steven Carter-Bailey from 2017. All hope to impress the judges with their skills and take home the title of Festive Star Baker. Music is provided by the London Gay Men's Chorus

programme.title: The Big Fat Quiz of Everything
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig, Joe Lycett, Katherine Ryan, Big Narstie, David Baddiel and Frank Skinner join quizmaster Jimmy Carr as he poses questions from the last 100,000 years of human history, giving a unique Big Fat Quiz spin on subjects such as history, music, film, TV and science from every epoch. As always, Jimmy is helped by a whole host of celebrity question-setters, including newsreader Jon Snow and actor Charles Dance

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette and Howard host a dinner party, but as it falls on Sheldon's Thai food night, he opts to bring his own dinner. As punishment for his lack of manners, the gang decides he should organise Wolowitz's cluttered wardrobe, but he discovers an unopened letter from Howard's father, who hasn't made contact in years

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys compete for a tenured professor position at the university, leading them to try to win over the committee in charge of appointing a new staff member, and arguing about who deserves the spot the most. However, the panel includes Mrs Davis from Human Resources, whom Sheldon has crossed paths with before. Guest starring Regina King

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britain's armchair critics share more of their critiques of the week's biggest and best shows. They've been watching Who Wants To Be A Millionaire?, (Un)well, Extinction: The Facts, Des, The Third Day, BBC News on the R number, and Breakfast with Michael Gove on Brexit

programme.title: Taskmaster

programme.title: Angel

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Sienna, Brody and Damon desperately try to find Liberty and Faith. Meanwhile, Theresa comes up with a plan, and Imran asks Ripley for help

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Harvey plans a romantic weekend in the mountains with Sabrina, but a series of mishaps leaves the couple trapped in a snowstorm with a witch-hunting pal who threatens to spoil the fun. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Salem falls in love with Dreama's cat Juliette, while Sabrina attempts to make a name for herself as an investigative reporter during her stint as editor of the school paper

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: The Captain asks Lily to move to Rome for a year so she can continue to act as his consultant while he lives there, but she is afraid Marshall will feel resentful toward her if she accepts. Meanwhile, Ted and Barney are captivated by the idea of seeing a woman's figure as it is always hidden beneath a large coat. American sitcom, guest starring Kyle MacLachlan

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted and Marshall are keen to make Barney's stag night one to remember, so they decide to kidnap him and take him to a secret party location. However, the entertainment soon proves disappointing and Barney gets a shock when the stripper arrives. Meanwhile, Robin struggles to spend an evening with her future mother-in-law. Guest starring Frances Conroy

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Joe's younger half-brother Tony visits and Mel is so impressed by his photography work that she asks him to take some pictures of her. Meanwhile, Lennox tries to avoid an unwell Ryder so she does not succumb to illness before a big party at the weekend. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Joe gets Ryder into trouble at school when he helps him complete a homework assignment. Meanwhile, Mel sneaks Lennox into a concert she is not old enough to attend. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon discover their favourite childhood TV science show host Professor Proton can be booked for private parties and decide to hire him to entertain them. Meanwhile, Raj asks Howard and Bernadette to look after his dog for the weekend, but the couple panic when the canine goes missing. Guest starring Bob Newhart

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys invite the girls to a Dungeons and Dragons night when their trip to Vegas falls through after an incident with airport security. However, following a few drinks, Sheldon and Amy's relationship takes an unexpected turn. Meanwhile, Raj goes on a date with Lucy, who tries to sneak out of the restaurant's bathroom window - but ends up getting stuck and calling for his help

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: The twins decide not to dress up for Halloween with the family for fear it will ruin their reputations at school. Meanwhile, Andre Jr spends time with a girl from Ruby's choir

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: The family is shocked to learn that Jack and Diane are not familiar with the music of Prince. Each member of the family works to explain about his tremendous impact on their lives

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle asks Peralta to be his best man, but as well as helping out with cake-tasting and choosing invitations, he must also persuade the groom to start standing up to Vivian before the big day. Holt helps Diaz make a sincere apology and Jeffords, Santiago and Gina embark on a tough new diet - but struggle to stick to it

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta enlists Jeffords to help him tackle a cold case that everyone thinks is unsolvable. Meanwhile, Santiago plans a romantic weekend away with her new boyfriend Teddy, and Gina and Diaz tell Boyle one of their best-kept secrets. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Melissa Fumero

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Raj turn to Bernadette for advice about their jealousy when Amy and Howard decide to collaborate on a new project. Penny and Leonard learn some new ways to manage Sheldon's irksome behaviour from an unlikely source

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon competes with Wil Wheaton (guest starring as himself) for the role of the new Professor Proton when the scientist's old TV series gets a reboot. Penny looks after Halley when Howard and Bernadette are both put on bed rest

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: JD tries to win his interns' respect - but fails to realise they only pretend to like him out of fear. Jordan is ostracised by everyone and duped by a drug addict, while Elliot turns to Carla for comfort from her career woes - which soon become common knowledge. Starring Zach Braff

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: JD's 30th birthday looms, and he still has a list of things to do before reaching that milestone - the first of which is competing in a triathlon. Turk treats a patient who wants to be hypnotised instead of receiving an anaesthetic, and Elliot learns a few disturbing things about her new boyfriend

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: When Mel punches a man who picks on Ryder at the cinema, a clip of the fracas is posted online and she becomes known as 'Battling Burke', much to the delight of her political campaign manager. Meanwhile, Lennox befriends a new girl at school, but she soon takes advantage of his kindness. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel wants to break up with her boyfriend Donald, but she feels guilty because he has just been fired from his job - so she asks Joe to help boost Donald's confidence before she dumps him. Meanwhile, Holly confides a secret to Lennox, and asks her to keep it from Ryder

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: While attempting to catch a drug dealer, Peralta and Boyle reluctantly join forces with Agent Jack Danger, a pompous investigator at the US Postal Inspection Service. Meanwhile, the other officers try to help Santiago conquer her cravings and give up smoking

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta tries to add a touch of romance to an event when he invites his girlfriend Sophia (Eva Longoria) to the precinct's work trip, along with Amy's boyfriend, Teddy (Kyle Bornheimer). Meanwhile, Charles is keen to help Holt with his anniversary breakfast, and Rosa refuses to admit to Terry and Gina that she is unwell. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: An urgent problem leads Mel and Maggie to seek help from their father, while Macy discovers a shocking secret about her past

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette's friends each try different tactics to help her go into labour. Howard isn't happy when he finds out that Bernadette has already chosen their son's name ithout his input

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: While Leonard jumps through hoops to help secure the perfect wedding venue for Sheldon and Amy, Howard and Bernadette have a difficult time deciding which one of them should stay at home with the kids and who should return to work

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: The doll blackmails the McQueens with another sin, just as Mercedes returns from being out all night. Elsewhere, Ripley gives Brooke some relationship advice

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Liza Tarbuck still leads the pack of five comics, as Russell Howard wraps a tie round his head and Tim Vine is left bereft by a small piece of bent metal

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The Vulture makes an unwelcome return to Peralta and Santiago's lives, threatening to swoop in and take something important away from them. programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Famous faces and celebrities, including Olly Murs, Niall Horan, Daniel Sturridge, Jamie Vardy and Alex Oxlade-Chamberlain, join the regular, opinionated viewers for a special episode for this year's Stand Up To Cancer. programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Robin tries to find her 'something old', which she buried in Central Park years previously in preparation for her potential future wedding. Meanwhile, Marshall and Lily ask Ted to help them pack for their trip to Italy, and Barney bonds with Robin's father

Boyle is devastated when Vivian ends their relationship, so his colleagues try to cheer him up

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

US cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Experts Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel Britain to find, fix and flog unwanted possessions on behalf of their owners, turning items into hard cash. A butter churn, a slot machine and a set of print trays are among the finds in this edition

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien repurposes some old suitcases, while Henry Cole gives an old dresser some serious bling

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Emma and Paul desperately need to fill their lake with fresh water ready for the artists' retreat they are hosting. Emma steps in to model Victorian outfits for the artists, while Paul struggles on kitchen duty. Angel gives Abbie and Karen tips on how to save money for their wedding business, and she shows them how to create a stunning bar

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton heads to Hampshire to meet Nikki and Darren, who have struck gold with their stunning seaside plot on which they want to build modern family home. However, their budget doesn't match their million-pound view, leading to stormy conditions on site and some choppy financial waters to navigate

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Robert Fox and his partner Kevin, who run Cherry Tree House in Blackpool, hope to be in with a chance of winning the title of best B&B as another round of the competition gets under way. However, two guests are shocked at the room prices, and an afternoon learning clown skills sees a North-South divide develop in the group

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Andy and Caroline Middleton host at the Old Hall Inn in North Yorkshire, where a couple of guests are unimpressed by a discovery in their bathroom, and the afternoon's angling activity leaves two more frustrated when they fail to catch a fish

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to George and Juliet Bristow's Pilot Boat Inn on the Isle of Wight, where some of the guests are amazed by the building - yet others are shocked to find cobwebs in their bedrooms. Also, the hosts' constant hovering at breakfast makes the diners feel uncomfortable

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Lucy Roe welcomes her guests to Rutland Terrace in Stamford, Lincolnshire, and although they are delighted with the elegant decor, George and Juliet are unimpressed by their lack of en-suite facilities. Kevin and Robert are horrified by the state of their mattress, before being accused of attention seeking at dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances, before the winner is announced

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: With Christmas fast approaching, the keepers try to get the animals into the festive spirit. Stockings have been hung for the Sumatran orang-utan family, only for eight-year-old Indah to open everyone else's. There is concern about the health of reticulated python Bali, who has been off her food for more than three months. She needs a check-up, but at 23ft it takes 10 brave keepers to catch her. Malayan tapirs Marjorie and Bitong welcome a baby, however the new dad is not happy when his daughter comes between him and his partner, and sun bear couple Tony and Millie's relationship is growing stale - will a trial separation help?

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Festive edition of the documentary from 2015 following the work of Professor Noel Fitzpatrick and his team. A sleigh-pulling Alaskan malamute needs both knees replacing with implants, but his owners are forced to make a difficult decision as he recovers from his first operation. Meanwhile, a springer spaniel is rushed into the surgery with a shattered jaw, so the vets decide to try something new to get him home in time for Christmas. Plus, a miniature dachshund with a deformed foot is given intensive physiotherapy, and Noel gets a surprise visitor

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Emma and Paul plan to host locals - including the mayor - to view the work they have done on the front of their chateau. However, Paul has first to design, build and, with a bit of advice from Dick Strawbridge, fit two heavy balconies from scratch. Elsewhere, Mariam and Johnno get their antique fireplace fitted, create a stylish sink out of a copper bucket, and host a 'thank you' meal for their builders

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Mark and Candida Diacono, who have set about building a home in the shape of a plough on their 17-acre smallholding in Devon. With its complex curved roof, timber-clad exterior and steel-framed working barn, the ambitious project presents a unique technical challenge for a local builder and his team of employees, and the task proves even more intimidating when considering Mark and Candida hope to complete work on the build within seven months

programme.title: Secret History
programme.desc: One of the most devastating pandemics in human history, the Black Death swept through London in 1348, killing old and young, rich and poor, within days of their first symptoms. Received wisdom has long suggested the culprit was bubonic plague, spread by the fleas of infected rats, and an unexpected discovery made by Crossrail engineers working on a shaft on the edge of London's Charterhouse Square in 2013 provides a new insight into how the disease passed from host to host. This documentary follows experts from a range of disciplines as they pick through the evidence, reveal why the disease killed on such a large scale, and discuss how it still poses a threat today

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This edition focuses on a mother's role in different family units. Jacob, 20, arrives in resus with suspected internal bleeding after crashing his car into a wall at high speed, while Joan, 82, is treated for a head wound after tripping down the stairs at home, and seven-year-old Jackson has a suspected infection on his cheek. Documentary following life inside the A&E department of St George's in south-west London, focusing on patients, their families and the staff dealing with the emergencies

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show's version of the words-and-numbers quiz, with captain Jon Richardson and Joe Wilkinson taking on guest captain Kevin Bridges and Jessica Knappett. John Cooper Clarke joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of the owners of Hannah & Mason's, a French bistro in Cranbury, New Jersey. Members of staff complain their pay cheques bounce, and the kitchen cooler is so unhygienic that Gordon makes the decision to close the restaurant on Valentine's Day - the busiest night of the year

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This edition focuses on a mother's role in different family units. programme.title: The Biggest Little Railway in the World
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge leads a team of enthusiasts attempting to build the longest model railway in history, stretching 71 miles across Scotland from Fort William on the west coast to Inverness on the east coast. The project faces an early challenge navigating the Caledonian Canal, but a train ferry proves an ingenious solution. The team must also apply full-size railway technology to the task of traversing Loch Lochy

programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty heads off to Israel on the trail of the fresh date, with his search taking him to a vast water purification plant where the raw sewage of Tel Aviv is used to turn barren desert into fertile farmland. Kate Quilton is in Belfast to meet a sausage-maker whose sales suffered in the wake of the recent World Health Organisation report linking processed meat to cancer, while Matt Tebbutt is in Kent, where experts have perfected the science of growing apples

programme.title: Four in a Bed

When the hosts reveal ferret racing is their chosen activity, a joke causes Eileen to lose her temper, so Ian and Maggie decide to stage a silent protest

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The hoteliers meet one last time for feedback, during which they will discover how much their rivals thought their service was worth, and which of them was the most successful. Maggie and Ian Dickson decide to tackle complaints from Eileen and Jannika Hopeakoski head-on, while Craig and Marie Harris prepare for a fight after telling German competitor Kristin Grantham her venue and welcome lacked some much-needed warmth

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Chester Zoo's keepers are busy making gifts for all the animals, but with chimp leader Dylan otherwise occupied by female attention, it is a chaotic free-for-all when the festive parcels are handed over to the chimps. Meanwhile, rhino couple Beni and Asha are experiencing family dysfunction, and when Asha ignores Beni, he is left to find solace in the company of a deer. Elsewhere, The zoo's new thousand-strong family of leaf cutter ants work together to build a new home for themselves out of their Christmas bounty

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Festive edition of the documentary following the work of Professor Noel Fitzpatrick and his team. The team also treats River, a Border terrier puppy who has fractured both back legs, and Noel makes a surprise visit home to Ireland

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge steps in to help new chateau owners couple Erin and JB who, having recently moved into their fairy-tale chateau complete with turrets and a moat, have discovered rising damp. Dick goes on an exploration of their vast cellar in search of the leak

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Stuart and Rosie Treasurer from the Wirral plan to transform a small bungalow from a 1960s dormer into a slick piece of 21st-century architecture. The couple decapitate the building and balance a new floating timber box on top to create five bedrooms, spending as little as possible on plumbing, electrics and insulation, but stress levels spiral when neighbours grumble at the ultra-modern creation

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: This festive episode from 1996 finds the Craggy Island clerics and six other priests lost in what seems to be the world's largest lingerie department, with only Ted's quick thinking preventing the Catholic Church being rocked by a major scandal. His bravery earns him the coveted Golden Cleric award, which is when his troubles really begin. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan, Ardal O'Hanlon and Frank Kelly

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Samuel, 24, is rushed to A&E after crashing his motorbike and being thrown into the road, while two-year-old Florence is brought in by her mum and dad, who suspect that she has swallowed a coin. Seventy-year-old Clive arrives after struggling to breathe at home, but his wife Linda has a difficult time keeping him in check, as he likes to tell a joke or two. Documentary following life inside the A&E department of St George's in south-west London, focusing on patients, their families and the staff

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show's version of the words and numbers quiz, with Sean Lock and Kathy Burke teaming up against Jon Richardson and David Mitchell. James Acaster joins Countdown's resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while maths whizz Rachel Riley and comedian Joe Wilkinson are in charge of the numbers

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay tries to help a struggling seafood restaurant in Manhattan, where the three owners regularly come into conflict as they each try to assert their authority over the business, causing confusion for all. When one of the trio stubbornly resists the changes the Scottish chef is hoping to implement, sparks begin to fly

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Samuel, 24, is rushed to A&E after crashing his motorbike and being thrown into the road, while two-year-old Florence is brought in by her mum and dad, who suspect that she has swallowed a coin. Seventy-year-old Clive arrives after struggling to breathe at home, but his wife Linda has a difficult time keeping him in check, as he likes to tell a joke or two. Documentary following life inside the A&E department of St George's in south-west London, focusing on patients, their families and the staff

programme.title: The Biggest Little Railway in the World
programme.desc: The miniature train begins its 71-mile journey, and the train ferry build in the previous episode does not work as well as expected. Further down the line, the track teams have to work quickly in heavy rain while fending off midges, while other engineers have to find a way to span a 60-metre viaduct that could flood at any moment

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: A look back at a selection of investigations from the Food Unwrapped casebook. Kate Quilton visits a cattle farm in America with supersized cows to feed the huge demand for beef, Jimmy Doherty discovers why pine nuts are so expensive, and Matt Tebbutt learns why shop-bought pies tend not to spill out their gravy - revealing that the answer grows on trees

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp visits the Nidderdale agricultural show in the Yorkshire Dales, where she learns how to make her own pork pies and sausages. However, her success jeopardised by problems the evening before the event

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Glenda and Tina from Dorset are looking for the perfect holiday home in Portugal's western Algarve. These nature-loving culture vultures are looking for somewhere where they can spend time walking their dog Lady and enjoying the rich local history. Jasmine Harman shows them five properties for their £100,000 budget

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien recycles some historic oak while Henry Cole comes unstuck when he tries to get to grips with an old Ford Escort

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole gives Simon O'Brien a motorcycling masterclass in Wiltshire as the duo seek more items to fix up and sell on to make profits for their owners

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge steps in to help new chateau owners couple Erin and JB who, having recently moved into their fairy-tale chateau complete with turrets and a moat, have discovered rising damp. Dick goes on an exploration of their vast cellar in search of the leak

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton is in Derbyshire meeting Sean and Jill who are building a traditional stone-clad home with a contemporary twist on the edge of the Derbyshire Dales

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at the Vale of Berkeley Guest House in Gloucestershire, where owners Harri and Claire Chiba hope to prove that their establishment offers the best value for money. However, two guests from rival B&Bs have an issue with the no-frills toilet, and another places a tricky request for 'anaemic toast' at the breakfast table

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition moves to Artist Residence in Penzance, Cornwall, where proprietors Justin and Charlie hope to impress their rivals with a pottery class. However, one pair decide their room is too modern for their tastes, a duo are shocked to find hair in a shower filter and one guest seems underwhelmed by breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Third to host are Alec and Craig Coleman, who open the doors to the Edenfield Guest House in Blackpool and invite their fellow B&B owners to rate their establishment. However, on arrival one of the guests and his wife discover stains on the bedspread, while others feel the 'award-winning' food is not up to scratch

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the New Inn, Portland, Dorset, for the fourth day of the competition, where hosts Stacey and Spencer Cullum introduce their guests to a typical island activity - sandcastle building. Meanwhile, Claire Chiba quizzes Stacey about her breakfast hamper and says she is alienating customers, before Harri Chiba tells Justin that his B&B is too 'manufactured'

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The four sets of owners meet one last time to discover how much their rivals thought they should receive and to settle some scores. Two contestants attempt to explain away their negative feedback, and one contender finds herself unable to hold back her frustration, before the winner of the competition is revealed

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: It's the festive season at Chester Zoo and the keepers are making sure everyone gets a gift, from the meerkats to the miniature monkeys. Christmas comes early with the birth of sun bear cub Kyra, but the new arrival proves a little over-adventurous and gets stuck up a tree. There's a yuletide ceasefire in the long turf war between the otters and the babirusas, the vets have terrible news about golden-headed tamarind Pru, and plucky spider Winston attempts to snag man-eater Ruby

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: As the festive season approaches at Fitzpatrick Referrals, Professor Noel and his team treat three special patients. A one-year-old crossbreed puppy rescued by a charity from Romania is in need of complex surgery, with no guarantee of success. An eight-year-old Dalmatian needs work on its spinal cord, and a Labrador from Switzerland is having trouble walking. Noel's investigations reveal problems with both shoulder and elbow, an unusual combination that requires dramatic intervention

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge fixes up his temperamental van at his chateau. Erin and JB start work on their honeymoon suite and solarium/sun room; with a little help from their friends. Alison and Paul make an exciting discovery with an underground chamber, which they transform into a bedroom complete with arrow hole window

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the progress of private chef Ed Versluys and pilates instructor Vicky Anderson, who want to convert a concrete cowshed in the Somerset countryside into a three-bedroom home. With the help of one young builder and the knowledge they can learn from the internet, the couple plan to project manage the conversion themselves. However, they have only eight months and a budget of just over £200k to make a warm and comfortable home with straw bale walls and wide expanses of glass

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George travels to Margate, where Joanna and Simon have bought themselves a large Victorian semi-detached house, only to become overwhelmed by the refurbishment task ahead. He also visits a grand Georgian manor built in 1820 and frequented by King Edward VII. The Worthing property was divided into flats in the 1980s and it is in one of these that owners Charlie and Julie are wrestling with how to turn a big Regency reception room into contemporary living and dining space

programme.title: Britain's Wildest Weather
programme.desc: Footage of the most extreme weather conditions in the UK over the past year, from the worst floods in a decade and a freak landslide in Fife, to an account of being in a house when it is struck by lightning. The programme also explains the scientific reasons behind the wildfire that destroyed one of the UK's most precious nature reserves, as well as a look back at record-breaking days of both heat and rain

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Zaki, 63, recently underwent a tonsillectomy following a diagnosis of throat cancer, but he has come to A&E after suffering a serious bleed. Doctors try to save 10-month-old baby Amy, who stopped breathing at home, while 21-year-old expectant father Craig appears to have had a miraculous escape after a motocross accident, but has he learnt his lesson?

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show's version of the words-and-numbers quiz, with Lee Mack and Victoria Coren Mitchell taking on Alan Carr and Dane Baptiste. Sam Simmons joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George gets to celebrate one of his favourite periods of British architecture when he helps out at an arts and crafts Edwardian terrace house in Addiscombe, south London. Cookie and Sophia bought their home six months ago, but, despite it being full to the brim with amazing original features, from fireplaces to balustrades and stained-glass windows, it needed some serious TLC. This renovation is a labour of love as the couple set about painstakingly restoring the features by themselves. George visits the wallpaper library of his all-time design hero William Morris, and tries his hand at block printing

programme.title: The Biggest Little Railway in the World
programme.desc: The train struggles to cross the first hill on the line - which is only a gentle incline compared to the vast rises to come. The team also needs to build a track-stabilising device to prevent the train from falling over, while Claire comes across a rocky stream near Fort Augustus, and makes plans to build a curving trestle bridge

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty, Kate Quilton and Matt Tebbutt present more of their favourite investigations. Jimmy learns that Greek yoghurt production creates a potentially devastating by-product, Kate heads deep into the Amazon rainforest to find out what gives red Leicester cheese its colour and Matt asks why ostrich meat is red when other poultry is white
